content: not me thinking 80 was the cap

Hey ! I just started the game and I was wondering if getting 2 characters of each category important ? I'm doing my first hundred and bunch standard pulls and I'm not sure where to go (I got these awakeners with the first free pull and the 20 limited pulls you can do with the silver from codes if that can help)

You got Thais, thats pretty big. Shes a very good support. 2 characters in each realm lets you complete all of the lightless realm challenges, but that isn't time limited or anything.

Having at least 1 awakener in each category will let you complete some of the event achievements, but you should get a character in aequor, caro, and ultra as you progress through the story (aurita, aigis, and erica). aigis and thais are a very popular and powerful support duo.
+guides

Please be sure to check out our <#1304022827824844842>  section! Here are a few resources, tips, and walkthroughs to help you master the game:


- [Morimens Compendium](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1TCU7LJRzqKeuvLe97y_TfGZ-j6jq5bZX6hskAAJ2mFQ/edit?gid=167686509#gid=167686509) by Mythag University

- [Store Guide](https://discordapp.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1442292634575175710) by Mythag University

- [Morimens New Players Handbook](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1477730088299663431) by Cheri
- [Boss Compendium](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1489244885025292328) by Mythag University
Oh thank you so much !!
Based on that is there any realm I should prioritize pulling for ? I have 140 standard pulls and I'm not certain on which one to go
Or should I just pull where coolest chars are and let's go

I think going for the coolest characters is probably the way to go :). Thais is one of the more flexible supports if you are building around her. 

If you were trying to build around a limited DPS that might bias you towards one standard realm so you could pick up their supports. For example, if you really wanted to pull for kath on the current banner you might want to pull chaos standard for karen or ultra for tinct. Or you could just play kath with thais and aigis lol, that support duo is a bit silly.

Pulling for whatever seems cool in standard then saving for the next good limited dps seems good to me.
Thank you so much <:blush:900361208480276491>  I was thinking on pulling for the current Doll banner because I think she looks very cool
But she's not a dps I think ?

Not really. She's kind of a niche support mainly for poison teams atm. She is also probably the most dupe hungry support in the game due to her really wanting her overexalt which unlocks at 8 copies. Normally support are fine somewhere in the endgame somewhere between enlighten 0 and enlighten 3.

She is a solid but replaceable character in poison teams but oddly enough poison is currently built around xu and the standard poison units a little more than doll inferno even though she is good with them.

embeds.title: How to kidnap a whale supporter
embeds.description: Click support Click favourite Enter UID Follow them Click followed and set favourite Now you can use their awakener without them following you back

content: why is that a topic
What is?
how to kidnap a whale supporter
because its not common knowledge that you can use a highly levelled unit without them following you back
so we made a post how to do it :3
interesting
quick explanation on damage amp and if its worth it on a covenant?
Oh, yeah what Ellie said earlier

Impacts the base damage of each characters skills, its applied teamwide. Generally not a great stat unless your DPS happens to have a way to scale their base damage (kath, ghelot) or they have some kind of special damage amp scaling built into their kit (castor).
For me damage amp usually ends up like 3rd or 4th on stats I am happy to see. For dps usually want crit rate and crit damage more.
Thanks! I remember someone made a google doc that had all the info but I can't find it on here

Not sure which one you are referring to, I think there were a lot of guides that covered which cov pieces had which main stats. Cheri's guide looks like it covers the character specific synergies for damage amp so maybe check that out https://docs.google.com/document/d/1THjxR9hHs4NWHqSWHHa2dHAGuE_cRGelfzXdBfCnIlM/edit?tab=t.0#heading=h.ba6hy87k1500
